item.title: express-react-generator-typescript
item.author: neotan.github.io
item.description: express-react-generator-typescriptExpress application generator, with TypeScript, Jest, ESLint and optionally React support, which’s inspired by Sean Maxwell’s express-generator-typescript. Installation1 $ npm install -g express-react-generator-typescript Quick StartCreate the app: 1 2 3 4 5 6 $ ergt my-app // Or add TypeScript support $ ergt -t my-app Start your app at http://localhost:5555/: 1 $ cd my-app && npm i && npm run dev Command Line OptionsThis generator can also be further configured with the following command line flags.

item.title: Simda.js, A light-weight alternative of Ramda.js
item.author: neotan.github.io
item.description: Simda.jsA light-weight alternative (in ES6+) of Ramda.js Installation1 npm i simda Usage1 2 3 4 import * as S from 'simda' const newObj = S.assocPath(['a', 1, 'c'], 999)({a: [{b: 111}]}) console.log(newObj) // => {a:[{b:111},{c:999}]}
